description:
Sundry is a WinGet local manifest management tool that makes it easier for you to remove manifests, make changes to them, and also aids in updating them.


Improvements:
- pref: Improved exception handling for the sundry sync command. by @DuckDuckStudio
Bug Fixes:
- fix: Fixed exception when the command fails. by @DuckDuckStudio
Full Changelog: https://github.com/DuckDuckStudio/Sundry/compare/1.1.1...1.1.2
